name: Jose Maria Garcia Alvarez
title: Senior Software Engineer

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.summary: Led migration of monolithic application to microservices architecture using Docker and Kubernetes, reducing deployment time by 70%. Designed and implemented scalable Python backend using FastAPI and PostgreSQL. Mentored team of 4 junior developers in best practices and code reviews. Established CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and ArgoCD.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.summary: Developed 12+ web applications using React frontend and Python/Flask backend. Implemented real-time data processing pipeline handling 1M+ events/day. Optimized database queries reducing response time by 45%. Collaborated with 3 cross-functional teams on product roadmap.
